title: Tapeworm Disco Puzzle
short_description: A grid-based NES puzzle game mixing Snake and Lolo, where you play as a tapeworm nightclub owner who lives inside a cassette tape.
description: Tapeworm Disco Puzzle is being designed to run on an NES and is a grid based puzzle game mixing elements of Snake and Lolo. You play as a tapeworm, the local night club owner. You are a tapeworm who lives inside a cassette tape.
